member.summary: Extension methods.

member.summary: Gets the datetime in the format that EasyPay required.
member.returns: A string representation of the datetime with the format, yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm.

member.summary: Parse the easypay datetime format to a object.
member.param: String representation of the datetime in easypya format.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Common.PaymentAmountReconciliation
member.summary: Validates that payment provider amounts match the expected donation total.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Common.PaymentAmountReconciliation.DefaultTolerance
member.summary: Default tolerance for currency rounding (EUR cents).

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Common.PaymentAmountReconciliation.AmountsMatchDonation(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true when requested and paid amounts match the expected donation amount within tolerance.
member.param: Amount requested by the payment provider.
Amount paid according to the payment provider.
member.returns: True when all three values align.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Common.PaymentAmountReconciliation.ProviderValueMatchesDonation(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true when the provider value matches the donation amount within tolerance.
